channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Michael Carrick Confirmed as Permanent Manchester United Manager After Interim Success
item.description: Michael Carrick has officially secured a long-term contract to continue as the manager of Manchester United after impressing during his caretaker spell. Appointed on an interim basis in January 2026 f...

item.title: Trump Considers Operation to Seize Iran's Enriched Uranium Despite Official Warnings
item.description: According to a report by Zeteo, President Donald Trump is reportedly preparing to authorize a high-risk operation aimed at seizing Iran's enriched uranium. While Trump has previously pursued regime ch...

item.title: Analysis of N800 Billion Alleged Misappropriation by APC Governors’ Forum
item.description: Last week, President Bola Tinubu encouraged unity among APC members as the party prepared for primaries, emphasizing selflessness and devotion. However, the party faces internal crises, particularly c...

item.title: Cycling 2,500km helped this couple realise marriage was just another challenge
item.description: Evan Lewis and Dat Tien Lewis met in San Francisco in 2015, coming from very different backgrounds—Evan was starting a Mongolian vodka business after leaving tourism consulting in China, while Dat was...

item.title: Ukraine launches drone strikes in Russia, resulting in four deaths according to Moscow
item.description: On May 17, 2026, Moscow authorities reported that a mass drone assault conducted by Ukrainian forces resulted in the deaths of four individuals in Russia. The drone barrage represents an escalation in...

item.title: Lea Salonga celebrates her son Nic Chien’s 20th birthday
item.description: Lea Salonga, the internationally acclaimed singer and actress, recently celebrated a milestone in her family as her son, Nic Chien, turned 20 years old. Known for her illustrious career in theatre and...

item.title: Understanding Why You Get Winded Climbing Stairs and How to Improve
item.description: Feeling out of breath after climbing stairs is a common experience for people of all ages and fitness levels. Medical experts explain that this is often a normal physiological response because stair c...

item.title: EFCC arraigns Blessing CEO over ₦36 million Lekki property fraud case
item.description: Na big wahala don land for social media influencer and self-proclaimed relationship therapist, Okoro Blessing Nkiruka, wey people sabi as Blessing CEO. EFCC don arraign her for Federal High Court, Iko...

item.title: Look Mum No Computer reacts to last-place finish at Eurovision 2026
item.description: The United Kingdom's 2026 Eurovision representative, Look Mum No Computer, has addressed the outcome of the competition after finishing last with the song 'Eins, Zwei, Drei'. The contest, held in Vien...

item.title: ODM leaders in Kisumu push for transparent 2027 gubernatorial nominations
item.description: A group of ODM leaders from Kisumu County has openly called for a competitive and transparent nomination process for the 2027 gubernatorial race. Led by MPs James Onyango K’Oyoo and Joshua Oron, along...

item.title: Police officers injured amid disorder during Celtic fans' title celebrations in Glasgow
item.description: Several police officers were injured during what authorities described as serious disorder in Glasgow following Celtic Football Club's Scottish Premiership title victory. The incidents occurred in the...

item.title: Union raises safety concerns over rushed Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool renovation
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration is aiming to complete renovations on the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C., ahead of the United States’ 250th anniversary on July 4. The proj...

item.title: Bulls qualify for URC quarter-finals with win over Benetton but Ackermann calls for improved execution ahead of Munster clash
item.description: The Bulls secured a solid 45-19 victory over Benetton at Loftus Versfeld in their final regular season United Rugby Championship match, but coach Johan Ackermann expressed dissatisfaction with certain...

item.title: Michael Jackson Collaborates with Designer Gloria Kim in the Early 1990s

item.title: NIA charges five persons in human trafficking racket sending Indians to cyber fraud operations in Cambodia
item.description: The National Investigation Agency has filed a chargesheet against five individuals involved in a serious human trafficking network that lured young Indians with fake job offers and sent them to Cambod...

item.title: xAI Introduces Grok Build, a New AI Tool for Software Development
item.description: xAI, the company founded by Elon Musk, has introduced Grok Build, its first AI-powered coding agent. The tool is designed to compete with other AI coding assistants like Anthropic's Claude Code. Musk ...

item.title: Survey Shows Americans Prefer Parents Over Government to Regulate Children's Social Media Use
item.description: A recent survey highlights that most Americans prefer parental oversight rather than government regulation of social media use by children. Despite growing concerns over minors' exposure to online pla...

item.title: Senator Tulfo to Question Senate Shooting Incident and Related Investigation
item.description: Senator Erwin Tulfo announced that the minority bloc will raise critical questions in the Senate session on Monday regarding the alleged shooting incident within the Senate premises last week. Tulfo e...

item.title: North Korean Women's Football Team Visits South Korea for Rare Match
item.description: The North Korean women's football team has arrived in South Korea for a highly anticipated and unusual sporting event. This visit marks one of the rare occasions in recent years where athletes from No...

item.title: Form Three Student Dies After Being Stabbed by Boyfriend During Funeral Vigil in Nyamira
item.description: Nyamira County has been thrown into shock and mourning after a Form Three student, Cherily Portia of Mwongoli High School, was allegedly stabbed to death by her boyfriend during her grandfather’s fune...
